examples: I did not have any intimation that he was going to resign.
There was no intimation from his doctor that his condition was serious.
He was good-looking, with dark eyes which could smoulder with just the right intimation of passion.
The intimation is that figures and references to nature inform all of Still's work.
Or, perhaps it was the intimation from Bernanke himself that QE III may already be under construction in his infamous interview on 60 Minutes.
